name: LCB224 LED Bar

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: AD00518F-2870-43D4-9C4D-9C7785C679DC

comment: LCB224 LED Bar 224x SMD RGB: The LCB224 is a LED bar with 224 pieces SMD RGB LEDs. The LEDs are divided in 16 separately controllable sections, with each section having its own RGB colour setting in DMX mode. While using the fixture in stand-alone mode there are pre-programmed shows runs automatically or sound activated, pick from pre-programmed automatic programs or create your own mixture of colours in RGB mode. The extra IEC output enables you to simply link the power of multiple units together into a single socket.

gwSpecs.description: The LCB224 is a LED bar with 224 pieces SMD RGB LEDs. The LEDs are divided in 16 separately controllable sections, with each section having its own RGB colour setting in DMX mode. The extra IEC output enables you to simply link the power of multiple units together into a single socket.

revision.text: New fixture type based on LCB244 LED Bar 24x 4W from BeamZ, Uploaded to GDTF Share.
